text: Breaking news out of London that could have serious economic and political reverberations for the rest of us: the cliffhanger vote on whether Britain will stay in the European Union. ABC's Lama Hassan now with the latest on what they're calling Brexit. The official results are in. The people of Britain have spoken, voting for a British exit dubbed Brexit, with almost 52 percent of the votes choosing to leave the 28 member European Union. Immigration was at the forefront of the Leave campaign for Britain to take control of its borders and its economy, national identity and culture. Make no mistake, this referendum is huge. This result to leave is monumental, a political earthquake with the financial ramifications uncertain. The pound falling sharply, plummeting against the dollar, which of course will impact Wall Street and global markets when they open. The Leave campaign hailing June 23rd as Britain's Independence Day. Dan, Lama, thank you, and for the latest on the fallout from Brexit, tune into GMA first thing in the morning.
